planner.name: rdf-planner
planner.description: Research-driven collaborative planner. Brainstorms ideas, researches best practices, challenges assumptions, writes specs and implementation plans. Use for any planning, scoping, or design work.

dispatcher.name: rdf-dispatcher
dispatcher.description: Plan execution orchestrator. Reads PLAN.md, executes phases via TDD, dispatches engineer/qa/uat/reviewer subagents, enforces quality gates. Use when executing implementation plans.

engineer.name: rdf-engineer
engineer.description: Universal implementation engineer. Follows TDD, reads governance for domain-specific conventions. Dispatched by the dispatcher for plan phase execution.

qa.name: rdf-qa
qa.description: Verification gate. Reads governance for project-specific checks (lint, tests, anti-patterns). Read-only — cannot modify source files. Dispatched by dispatcher or invoked via /r:verify.

uat.name: rdf-uat
uat.description: User acceptance testing. Runs real-world scenarios from end-user persona. Read-only — cannot modify source files. Dispatched by dispatcher or invoked via /r:test.

reviewer.name: rdf-reviewer
reviewer.description: Adversarial reviewer with two modes: challenge (pre-impl spec/plan review) and sentinel (post-impl 4-pass code review). Read-only — cannot modify source files. Dispatched by planner, dispatcher, or invoked via /r:review.

build.description: Execute implementation plan phase via dispatcher

verify.description: Run QA verification against diff or specified scope

test.description: Run UAT acceptance tests from end-user perspective

review.description: Adversarial review in challenge or sentinel mode
